about: South Windsor Barber Shop is the only barber shop in town affiliated with the original Professional Barber Shop in downtown Hartford, established in 1927. Owned by Christopher M. Rosa, a barber with over 25 years of experience, the shop offers luxury grooming services to help keep your hair and face healthy and looking great. Every service includes a complimentary hot steam towel and shoulder massage. Whether you prefer a contemporary style or a timeless classic look, South Windsor Barber Shop provides a comfortable, clean environment with complimentary beverages and flat-screen TVs. Walk-ins are welcome and appointments are accepted.
features: Complimentary hot steam towel with every service
Premium grooming products (American Crew, Clubman, Woody's)

designBrief.colorDirection: deep navy, warm wood tones, cream, burgundy accents
designBrief.inspiration: Classic American barbershop with modern polish. Clean lines, strong typography.
designBrief.avoidance: No hipster/trendy aesthetic. No neon. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Dark background, bold condensed display type, warm accent stripe
designBrief.uniqueElement: Animated barber pole stripe accent or rotating service showcase
